caption: A scene featuring several men in a formal setting is shown, with a bright red backdrop and a white screen behind them. In the center, a man in a dark suit bows slightly toward another man in a dark suit, who is leaning in toward him. Around them stand other men, including some in military or police uniforms with peaked caps and medals. One man on the left wears a light-colored jacket and glasses, while another man sits at a table to the right. A red banner at the top contains white and yellow text that reads "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'", and a blue banner at the bottom features white and yellow text stating "जे. पी. नड्डा: नीतीश का वापस आना सुखद समाचार है". A small logo with the text "MAHADEV" and "JUST BE MODERN" is visible in the bottom right corner, next to a time stamp of "10:01 PM". The scene remains largely static, with slight changes in the men's postures and head positions as the interaction unfolds.
